member.name: P:GTA.Ped.InjuryHealthThreshold
member.summary:
Gets or sets the injury health threshold for this
. The pedestrian is considered injured when its health drops below this value. The pedestrian dies on attacks when its health is below this value.
member.value:
The injury health threshold. Should be below
.
member.remarks: Note on player controlled pedestrians: One of the game scripts will consider the player wasted when their health drops below this setting value.
